> ℹ️ **This issue is only for registering/announcing a publication.**
> Per the ISSC Publication Review Manual (v1.0), registration normally happens by **email or Slack to PubCom**, who assign a **Paper Handler**. The actual review is then run in a **Pull Request** — see the README. Use this issue only if you'd like a public GitHub record of the registration step.

- **Title:**
- **Author(s):**
- **Author contact(s)** (1–3, at least one ISSC member):
- **Preliminary Category** (1 Mandatory / 2 Encouraged / 3 Optional):
- **Preliminary Class** (a–g):
- **Requested expert reviewers** (optional):

[paste abstract]
